prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Normal
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~15 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 54.5 kg; Height 158.1 cm; BMI 21.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/86 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 181mg/dL; 9 months ago 170mg/dL; 6 months ago 201mg/dL; 3 months ago 144mg/dL; current 171mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 55.3kg; 9 months ago 55.9kg; 6 months ago 55.3kg; 3 months ago 52.9kg; current 54.5kg), Height (12 months ago 158.1cm; 9 months ago 158.1cm; 6 months ago 158.1cm; 3 months ago 158.1cm; current 158.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 145mmHg; 9 months ago 146mmHg; 6 months ago 142mmHg; 3 months ago 147mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 87mmHg; 9 months ago 86mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 88mmHg; current 86mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 35U/L; 3 months ago 27U/L; current 29U/L), AST (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 21U/L; current 22U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; current 39mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 198mg/g; 9 months ago 135mg/g; 6 months ago 128mg/g; 3 months ago 120mg/g; current 147mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 100mg/dL; 9 months ago 98mg/dL; 6 months ago 97mg/dL; 3 months ago 98mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 135mg/dL; 9 months ago 132mg/dL; 6 months ago 132mg/dL; 3 months ago 135mg/dL; current 126mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.39 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
